playerPoseAuthority.mainFinding: Simulation now owns the target player pose, but the stored resource discards solve-frame identity and the renderer derives an unacknowledged damped visible pose from persistent Three.js bone state.
requiredProof: every accepted PlayerPoseFrame cites one run tick frame rig and source-state revision
renderer consumes only a committed target pose frame
presentation smoothing cites one source frame and policy revision
predecessor run bone state cannot leak silently into a successor
missing stale invalid and failed pose states are typed zero-mutation results
the first visible skeleton frame cites source and presentation frame identities
source runtime built-output and Pages fixtures agree
